Property.name: description
Property.value: Default theme with base control styles for nim-duilib framework

FontFile.desc: 字体名称：Roboto Mono，常规字体

DefaultFontFamilyNames.windows: Microsoft YaHei, SimSun, Segoe UI, Arial, sans-serif
DefaultFontFamilyNames.macos: PingFang SC, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif
DefaultFontFamilyNames.linux: Noto Sans CJK SC, Noto Sans, DejaVu Sans, sans-serif
DefaultFontFamilyNames.freebsd: Noto Sans CJK SC, Noto Sans, DejaVu Sans, sans-serif

FallbackFontFamilyNames.windows: Segoe UI Emoji, MingLiU-ExtB, Microsoft JhengHei-ExtB, SimSun-ExtB, SimSun-ExtG
FallbackFontFamilyNames.macos: Apple Color Emoji, PingFang SC, Songti SC, Hiragino Sans GB
FallbackFontFamilyNames.linux: Noto Color Emoji, Source Han Serif CN, Source Han Sans CN
FallbackFontFamilyNames.freebsd: Noto Color Emoji, Source Han Serif CN, Source Han Sans CN

Class.name: btn_wnd_min_11
Class.disabled_image: file='${PATH_BUTTON}/window-minimize.svg' width='${SIZE_WND_ICON}' height='${SIZE_WND_ICON}' valign='center' halign='center' svg_replace_colors='#333333|border_svg_image' fade='128'

Class.name: btn_wnd_close_11
Class.disabled_image: file='${PATH_BUTTON}/window-close.svg' width='${SIZE_WND_ICON}' height='${SIZE_WND_ICON}' valign='center' halign='center' svg_replace_colors='#333333|border_svg_image' fade='128'

Class.name: btn_wnd_max_11
Class.disabled_image: file='${PATH_BUTTON}/window-maximize.svg' width='${SIZE_WND_ICON}' height='${SIZE_WND_ICON}' valign='center' halign='center' svg_replace_colors='#333333|border_svg_image' fade='128'

Class.name: btn_wnd_restore_11
Class.disabled_image: file='${PATH_BUTTON}/window-restore.svg' width='${SIZE_WND_ICON}' height='${SIZE_WND_ICON}' valign='center' halign='center' svg_replace_colors='#333333|border_svg_image' fade='128'

Class.name: btn_wnd_fullscreen_11
Class.disabled_image: file='${PATH_BUTTON}/window-fullscreen.svg' width='${SIZE_WND_ICON}' height='${SIZE_WND_ICON}' valign='center' halign='center' margin='0,4,0,0' svg_replace_colors='#333333|border_svg_image' fade='128'

Class.name: btn_wnd_settings_11
Class.normal_image: file='${PATH_BUTTON}/btn_setting.svg' width='18' height='18' valign='center' halign='center' margin='0,2,0,0' svg_replace_colors='#333333|border_svg_image'
Class.disabled_image: file='${PATH_BUTTON}/btn_setting.svg' width='18' height='18' valign='center' halign='center' margin='0,2,0,0' svg_replace_colors='#333333|border_svg_image' fade='128'

Class.name: btn_switch_theme
Class.disabled_image: file='${PATH_BUTTON}/switch_theme.svg' width='${SIZE_WND_ICON}' height='${SIZE_WND_ICON}' valign='center' halign='center' svg_replace_colors='#333333|border_svg_image' fade='128'

Class.name: btn_switch_lang
Class.disabled_image: file='${PATH_BUTTON}/switch_lang.svg' width='${SIZE_WND_ICON}' height='${SIZE_WND_ICON}' valign='center' halign='center' svg_replace_colors='#333333|border_svg_image' fade='128'

Class.name: combo_base
Class.combo_edit_class: bkcolor='bg_richedit' disabled_color='bg_combo_disabled' text_align='vcenter' text_padding='2,0,2,0' single_line='true' word_wrap='false' auto_hscroll='true'

Class.name: combo
Class.combo_button_class: height='stretch' width='auto' margin='1,0,0,0' padding='1,0,0,0' border_size='1,0,0,0' valign='center' hovered_border_color='border_combo_hovered' pressed_border_color='border_combo_hovered' disabled_border_color='border_combo_disabled' hovered_color='bg_combo_btn_hovered' pressed_color='bg_combo_btn_pressed' disabled_color='bg_combo_btn_disabled' normal_image={file='${PATH_COMBO}/arrow_normal.svg' valign='center'} hovered_image={file='${PATH_COMBO}/arrow_hovered.svg' valign='center'}

Class.name: check_combo
combo_button
Class.left_button_class: height='stretch' width='stretch' padding='0,0,1,0' border_size='0,0,1,0' valign='center' hovered_border_color='border_combo_hovered' pressed_border_color='border_combo_hovered' hovered_color='bg_combo_btn_hovered' pressed_color='bg_combo_btn_pressed'
Class.right_button_class: height='stretch' width='auto' padding='1,0,0,0' border_size='1,0,0,0' valign='center' hovered_border_color='border_combo_hovered' pressed_border_color='border_combo_hovered' hovered_color='bg_combo_btn_hovered' pressed_color='bg_combo_btn_pressed' normal_image={file='${PATH_COMBO}/arrow_normal.svg' valign='center'} hovered_image={file='${PATH_COMBO}/arrow_hovered.svg' valign='center'}
